transcript:
SOURCE: Fathom (via HubSpot internal notes) — https://fathom.video/share/eWPK4EAJH8eF1YsVeMyszQznb6vhFanA

AI Meeting Summary ✨

Generated by Fathom // View Recording (45 mins - No highlights)

Meeting Purpose

To explore digital marketing solutions for Andrew Bakos's PI firm.

Key Takeaways

Problem: Andrew Bakos's PI firm faces a crisis, with case volume dropping from 10–20 referrals/month to 1–2. This resulted from referral sources aging out and a health-related slowdown, leaving the firm with only ~30 active cases.

Goal: Shift from high-volume work (~150+ cases) to a selective practice focused on 5–10 high-value cases (e.g., catastrophic injury, TBI) per year.

Proposed Solution: SMB Team's "Full Service Marketing Starter" package.

Management Fee: $5,697/month.

Ad Spend: $25,000/month (paid directly to platforms).

Strategy: Use paid ads for immediate leads while building long-term organic presence to reduce future cost-per-lead.

Next Step: A follow-up call is scheduled for Monday, June 22nd at 1:00 PM Pacific for SMB Team to present a tailored marketing roadmap.

Topics

Firm's Crisis & Need for Leads

Background: Solo PI attorney since 1990, known for trying difficult cases (60–70% win rate) and extracting value from non-economic damages.

Case Volume Decline:

Past: 10–20 referrals/month → ~150–200 active cases.

Present: 1–2 referrals/month → ~30 active cases.

Root Cause: Referral network attrition (aging out, buyouts) and a health-related slowdown.

Past Marketing: Dissatisfied with FineLaw, finding their SEO results inconsistent and expensive.

Strategic Shift & Marketing Goals

New Goal: Transition from high-volume work to a selective practice focused on 5–10 high-value cases annually.

Ideal Case Profile: Catastrophic injury, TBI, trucking accidents, wrongful death.

Capacity: Can immediately handle 50–60 new cases, but prefers quality over quantity.

Urgency: Needs leads "yesterday" but understands the process requires time.

Proposed Solution: SMB Team's Package

Strategy: A two-pronged approach.

Short-Term: Paid ads (PPC, Local Service Ads, social retargeting) for immediate lead flow.

Long-Term: SEO and content creation for sustainable organic presence, reducing future cost-per-lead.

Package Details:

Management Fee: $5,697/month.

Ad Spend: $25,000/month (paid directly to platforms).

Rationale: High ad spend is necessary in the PI market, where cost-per-call can reach $625–$1,500.

Andrew's Concern: The term "qualified leads" is too vague. He wants a clear ROI and is open to a performance-based model (not a fee split) once cases generate revenue.

Long-Term Vision & Firm Structure

Firm Structure: Solo attorney with one assistant. Andrew handles all PI intake calls to build trust and increase conversion.

Future Growth: SMB Team can refer intake services if case volume exceeds Andrew's capacity.

Andrew's Timeline: Plans to practice for 5–7 more years.

Succession: No formal plan; a nephew may attend law school but is not committed.

Next Steps

Jacob Meissner:

Develop a tailored marketing roadmap with projections for Andrew Bakos.

Send a calendar invite for the follow-up meeting.

Share PI case studies and client testimonials.

Andrew Bakos:

Attend the "Deep Dive" event on Thursday, June 18th.

Attend the follow-up meeting on Monday, June 22nd at 1:00 PM Pacific.

Action Items

Consult marketing team re: Andrew's CA PI market; prep projections/roadmap for Jun 22 1 pm PT - WATCH (5 secs)
Send Andrew calendar invite for Jun 22 1 pm PT - WATCH (5 secs)
Email Andrew PI case studies/testimonials - WATCH (5 secs)
